currentFAQs.q: How much does it cost to replace windows in {{CITY}}?
currentFAQs.a: Most homeowners in {{CITY}} pay between {{AVG_LOW}} and {{AVG_HIGH}} for a full-home window replacement, depending on window type and quantity.

currentFAQs.q: Are vinyl or wood windows better?
currentFAQs.a: Vinyl windows are the most affordable and low-maintenance option. Wood windows offer a premium look and better insulation but cost more and require periodic maintenance.

currentFAQs.q: How many windows does a typical home have?
currentFAQs.a: Most homes have between 15 and 25 windows. A standard 3-bedroom home typically has around 15-20 windows.
